Author: Microsoft Developer
Title: The IQ Series: Foundry IQ (Starting March 18)
Description:
The IQ Series is a developer‑focused learning series exploring Microsoft IQ as the intelligence layer for modern AI systems.

Starting with Foundry IQ, we break down how retrieval, reasoning, synthesis, and orchestration come together to power knowledge‑centric AI applications.

📅 New episodes begin March 18 and drop every Wednesday. 🔗 Learn more: https://aka.ms/iq-series
